title: Bitcoin miners’ AI pivot faces investor scrutiny over insider sales
summary: As AI-driven mining stocks retreat, investors are examining executive stock sales, governance and shareholder alignment across leading Bitcoin miners, according to Blocksbridge Consulting.

title: UK politicians mull permanent crypto donation ban in wake of Nigel Farage scandal
summary: Labour lawmakers proposed a full moratorium on crypto donations in March, which some have sought be made permanent after millions of dollars in contributions were linked to Reform leader Nigel Farage.

title: Oil Falls as Traders Expect US-Iran Conflict Will Stay Contained
summary: Oil fell as traders priced in a limited US-Iran conflict, easing initial concerns that energy infrastructure would come under attack again.

title: Copper Rallies as Risk Assets Shrug Off More US Strikes on Iran
summary: Copper jumped during a broad rally for industrial metals as investors shrugged off a fresh round of US strikes on Iran to track broader gains in risk assets.

title: Ethereum Foundation Turns AI Loose on ETH Network to Find Bugs Before Hackers Do
summary: Ethereum researchers are using AI agents to hunt for vulnerabilities, shifting security work from finding bugs to proving which ones are real.

title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.6 Sol: Here’s How It Stacks Up Against Other AI Models
summary: OpenAI's new flagship model is out, after spending two weeks locked behind a government-approved preview. It lands the same week Fable 5 leaves Anthropic's subscription plans.

title: White House defends Trump’s regulatory appointments as CFTC vacancies complicate crypto bill push
summary: The White House pushed back against Democrats’ criticism that the administration has declined to appoint commissioners to regulatory agencies.

title: Hyperliquid Policy Center, Phantom urge CFTC to stop treating onchain protocols like traditional brokers and exchanges
summary: The CFTC and Securities and Exchange Commission issued a Request for Information in mid-June on financial innovation.

title: US strikes Iranian railway bridges on route to city of Khamenei’s burial
summary: Late supreme leader set to be interred in Mashhad on Thursday

title: There is no grand plan on Iran
summary: An over-reaching Tehran seems to be looking at America’s confused moves and wondering what it may be missing
